title: TECKNET Gaming Keyboard Gryphon LED Backlit Illuminated Programmable Wired Gaming Keyboard with Ergonomic Wrist Rest, Spill-Resistant Design, US Layout

variation_files.prompt: A dynamic, high-contrast action scene featuring the keyboard prominently positioned in the foreground, angled slightly to the right, with a strong sense of depth. The keyboard is illuminated with vibrant blue backlighting, casting a cool glow that contrasts with the fiery, dark environment. The background depicts a gritty, industrial warzone with dark, metallic surfaces, shattered glass, and sparks flying through the air, creating a sense of intense motion and chaos. On the right side of the frame, a soldier in tactical gear, wearing a helmet and holding a rifle, stands in a combat-ready stance, partially lit by orange flames and red laser beams streaking across the scene. The lighting is dramatic, with high contrast between deep shadows and bright highlights from explosions and gunfire.
